subcodes.first_line: This is a mighty day, for therein hath the Great Announcement been made manifest, and that which was recorded in the divine Books of old [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز روزیست عظیم چه که نبا عظیم در او ظاهر شده و آنچه در کتب الهی از قبل و
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @exhortations and counsels, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
